prompt: Close-up photo of a friendly golden retriever with a soft purple rope leash gently looped over the bridge of its nose. The dog looks calm, comfortable and trusting. Soft natural outdoor lighting, shallow depth of field with blurred green park background. The rope is thin, flexible, and gentle-looking. Professional product photography style. Warm natural tones. No text overlays.

A person walking a medium-sized golden retriever dog calmly on a sidewalk in a beautiful tree-lined neighborhood. The dog is walking beside the person, not pulling. The leash is visible and loose between them. Warm golden hour lighting. Shot from slightly behind at a side angle. Happy, peaceful mood. Professional lifestyle photography. No text overlays.

Close-up detail shot of a sturdy metal clip attached from a rope leash to a dog collar around a dog's neck. The connection point is clearly visible showing the backup safety system. The dog has a nice collar and the leash clip securely connects to it. Clean, well-lit product photography. Professional lighting with soft background blur. No text overlays.

Close-up of a person's hands adjusting a small sliding stopper bead on a purple rope leash. The stopper is a small round piece that slides and locks on the rope to adjust the leash position. Clean product photography style with natural soft lighting and blurred background. Shows the adjustability feature clearly. No text overlays.

Wide shot of a happy young woman walking her golden retriever dog in a scenic lush green park with trees and a walking path. The dog is walking calmly by her side, both looking relaxed and content. Beautiful warm golden hour lighting. Aspirational lifestyle photography feel. The woman is smiling. Slightly wider framing. No text overlays.

Candid style photo of a person walking a German Shepherd dog on a beautiful tree-lined path in a park. The German Shepherd is walking nicely on a leash beside the owner. Natural authentic feel like a customer sharing their photo. Daytime with dappled sunlight through the leaves. Warm friendly tones. No text overlays.

A happy Labrador Retriever looking up at the camera with tongue out, joyful expression, while on a walk in a green park. The dog is on a leash. Outdoor natural setting with grass and trees. Warm friendly authentic customer-photo style. Close-up portrait of the happy dog. No text overlays.

Split comparison image. Left half shows a large dog pulling hard on a leash, the owner struggling, leash taut, chaotic energy. Right half shows the same type of dog walking calmly and peacefully beside their owner, leash loose, both relaxed. Clear visual contrast between pulling and calm walking. Medium sized brown Labrador dog. Outdoor park setting. No text overlays.

An adorable golden retriever puppy on a walk with its female owner in a sunny neighborhood with houses and trees. The puppy is small, fluffy, and walking calmly on a leash beside the owner's feet. Warm happy authentic feel like a proud customer photo. Natural daylight. Cute and heartwarming. No text overlays.

This is a split before/after image of a woman walking a chocolate Labrador in an autumn park. The image is divided vertically into two halves. LEFT HALF (before): A woman struggling with her dog pulling hard on a standard grey flat leash - DO NOT CHANGE ANYTHING on the left half, keep it pixel-perfect identical. RIGHT HALF (after): The same woman smiling, dog walking calmly. ONLY MODIFY THE RIGHT HALF: Replace the plain grey flat leash in the right half with a Heather's Heroes Sidekick rope leash. The Sidekick is: (1) A thick, soft braided purple rope leash, deep purple/violet color (#321B58). (2) A braided purple rope loop sits across the bridge of the dog's nose - this is the nose loop/halter piece, it forms an oval shape that crosses over the muzzle of the dog, sitting on the nose bridge like a gentle control loop. (3) The purple braided rope extends from the nose loop up along the dog's face and neck, then continues naturally up to where the woman holds it in her right hand. The rope should be visibly thick, braided/textured, distinctly purple. Keep the park background, fallen autumn leaves, woman's navy jacket, grey sweater, jeans, black boots, and the dog's chocolate brown fur completely unchanged. Only replace the leash mechanism with the purple Sidekick rope nose leash system on the RIGHT SIDE ONLY.

Edit ONLY the right half of this split image. The left half shows a woman struggling with a dog on a grey flat leash - leave it completely unchanged. On the RIGHT HALF ONLY: The chocolate Labrador is walking calmly. Replace the existing leash with a Heather's Heroes Sidekick nose rope leash system: a thick braided purple rope (deep violet purple color) that forms a loop across the dog's nose bridge/muzzle area - similar to a horse halter but for dogs. The purple braided rope oval loop wraps gently around the dog's muzzle over the nose, and the main purple rope leash extends from this nose loop upward to the woman's hand. The rope is thick, braided, textured, and distinctly deep purple (#321B58 color). Make the nose loop clearly visible as a purple braided oval sitting on top of the dog's muzzle/nose bridge. The woman, her outfit, the park, and everything else in the right side stays identical.
